title: ICAI Cautions Against Fake Communications & Impersonation Attempts
content:
# ICAI Cautions Against Fake Communications & Impersonation Attempts

Ek important update hai. The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne apne members, students, aur general public ko fraudulent communications aur impersonation attempts se bachne ke liye ek public advisory jari ki hai.

Yeh advisory **May 8, 2026** ko issue ki gayi hai, aur ismein kuch key points highlight kiye gaye hain:

*   **Fraudulent Activities:** Fraudsters ICAI office personnel, officials, departments, committees, regional councils, aur branches ka roop dharan karke unauthorized calls, emails, WhatsApp messages, aur anya deceptive communications kar rahe hain.
*   **Targeted Information:** Yeh dhokebaaz sensitive financial aur personal information jaise banking credentials, OTPs, aur passwords maang rahe hain.
*   **ICAI's Clarification:** ICAI ne saaf kiya hai ki woh kabhi bhi aise confidential details unofficial channels ke through nahi maangta hai.
*   **Vigilance Advised:** Members aur public ko suspicious links, unverified files, aur misleading study materials jo social media par circulate ho rahe hain, unse savdhaan rehne ki salaah di jaati hai.
*   **Official Channels Only:** Sabhi official communications sirf authorized ICAI channels ke through hi release kiye jaate hain. Payments bhi sirf approved portals aur official mechanisms se hi karne chahiye.
*   **Legal Action:** ICAI ne yeh bhi chetawani di hai ki unke naam aur logo ka durupayog, aur unauthorized communications, par legal aur criminal proceedings ho sakti hain.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icai.org/post.html?post_id=20808)

*Published on: 10 May 2026*
